value.found_quote: Codex can run subagent workflows by spawning specialized agents in parallel and then collecting their results in one response.
value.rationale: The page explicitly and directly substantiates the claim. The opening sentence of the page matches the claim almost verbatim: Codex spawns specialized agents in parallel and collects their results in one consolidated response. The page further confirms this is generally available ("Current Codex releases enable subagent workflows by default"), placing the lifecycle status as active.
